_comment: Edit this file to control what fetch_assets.py pulls in. Keep every entry GENERIC sci-fi (no Star Wars trademarks: no 'X-Wing', 'landspeeder', 'moisture vaporator', 'astromech', 'Tatooine', etc). See docs/ASSET_PIPELINE.md.

kenney_packs.note: sci-fi station/hab modules -> domed spaceport buildings
ships, landing pads, rovers, antennae, dishes
crates, barrels, fences, tents, cover clutter
rocks, cliffs, dry foliage for sand terrain
generic sci-fi weapons/props (url resolved at runtime)
pipes, tanks, industrial props that read as refinery gear
market-stall / awning / barrel shapes for a bazaar
barrels, crates, planks for stalls and cover

tripo_prompts.name: condenser_tower
tripo_prompts.prompt: low-poly tall cylindrical moisture condenser tower, weathered sand-colored metal, desert farm equipment, game asset, clean topology

tripo_prompts.name: domed_dwelling
tripo_prompts.prompt: low-poly small domed desert dwelling, adobe and sandstone, flat roof, sci-fi frontier town building, game asset

tripo_prompts.name: vendor_cart
tripo_prompts.prompt: low-poly desert market vendor cart with fabric awning, wooden frame, crates of goods, game asset

tripo_prompts.name: utility_droid
tripo_prompts.prompt: low-poly small cylindrical utility maintenance droid on three legs, dome top, sci-fi robot, game asset, generic design

tripo_prompts.name: hover_speeder
tripo_prompts.prompt: low-poly single-rider open-cockpit repulsor hovercraft, no wheels, worn metal, desert vehicle, game asset

tripo_prompts.name: power_generator
tripo_prompts.prompt: low-poly squat industrial power generator with vents and cables, weathered metal, sci-fi prop, game asset
